signal: Integration as a seller or buyer node on the ONDC network

signal: Launching digital educational or interactive gaming modules targeting users under 18
rationale: Triggers the highest protection tier of DPDP Rules 2025. Processing children's data without verifiable parental consent can create severe statutory penalty exposure, including penalties up to INR 200 crore per instance.
mapped_ICICI_Lombard_products: Cyber Liability with regulatory fines sub-limits, plus Directors and Officers (D&O) Liability for statutory defense costs.

signal: Publicly updating Terms of Service to include automated third-party AI or LLM decision-making
rationale: Use of large language models for customer advisory introduces algorithmic bias and hallucination risks, which can lead to professional negligence claims if AI gives materially incorrect operational advice.
mapped_ICICI_Lombard_products: Errors and Omissions (E&O) / Professional Indemnity for technology services and automated advisory failures.

signal: Executing sublease agreements to monetize excess commercial real estate to unaffiliated micro-entities

mapped_ICICI_Lombard_products: Commercial General Liability (CGL) with endorsements for sub-tenancy and extended premises liability.

signal: Appointing an external high-profile Data Protection Officer and announcing a compliance overhaul
rationale: Publicly indicates a transition toward Significant Data Fiduciary obligations under the DPDP Act. The DPO mandate may expose historical data architecture breaches requiring regulatory response.
mapped_ICICI_Lombard_products: D&O Liability for the DPO and board, plus Cyber Liability.

signal: Pivoting from software-only SaaS to distributing white-labeled consumer hardware

signal: Initiating registration with the DPBI to operate as an authorized Consent Manager

signal: Deploying checkout finance or BNPL through a regulated NBFC partner

signal: Publishing and open-sourcing proprietary internal API infrastructure to developer communities

signal: Migrating enterprise architecture from centralized on-premise servers to multi-cloud federated environments
